title: 11 fixes — clock-skew calls, timeAgo neg, missing .catches, TZ consistency
notes: CRITICAL FIX: Incoming-call invites were being silently dropped if your device clock was even 60 seconds behind the server. Now tolerates clock skew in both directions + widens stale window to 5 minutes.
FIX: Posts/messages from the future (server-time ahead of your clock) no longer render as '-3m ago' — show 'Just now' instead. Fixed in 4 timeAgo functions across the app.
FIX: ProfileScreen timeAgo had a leftover bug Round 7 missed — posts showed different times on Home vs Profile for users in non-UTC timezones.
FIX: Mark-all-notifications-read now rolls back on RLS/network failure (was zeroing the badge locally even when server stayed unread → next reload popped the badge right back).
FIX: 5 more silent-failure paths — toggleLike, toggleLikeU, submitComment, reaction INSERT, saveEditPostProf — all now roll back on raw network rejects with user-visible toasts.
FIX: Activity log day grouping ('Today'/'Yesterday') was mixing browser TZ + stored TZ. Now uses your stored TZ consistently.
POLISH: useFollow now toasts on failure (was silent + console-only), follow button stops looking 'stuck'.
POLISH: Wallet coin balance can't display negative values (clamped in setSharedCoinBalance to mirror CallScreen guard).
POLISH: Moment viewer no longer says 'just now ago' (cosmetic).
